stories.title: MLB second-half preview: Is your team a World Seri...
stories.summary: Who will rule the rest of the season? Here's everything you need to know coming out of the All-Star break.

stories.title: LeBron says he's not ready to reveal next team
stories.summary: LeBron James remains undecided about where he'll play this season. The NBA's all-time scoring leader and current free agent spoke Thursday but didn't reveal his next team choice.

stories.title: UM did not discuss AD Manuel's future at meeting
stories.summary: The University of Michigan's board of regents did not discuss the future of athletic director Warde Manuel during a Thursday meeting.

stories.title: MLB to open season March 24, pending lockout
stories.summary: Major League Baseball is set to have its earliest Opening Day next year on March 24 except for any international games -- if there is an Opening Day.

stories.title: NBA looking into deal between Bucks, Trent Jr.
stories.summary: The NBA is investigating a four-year, $64 million deal between Gary Trent Jr. and the Bucks for possible salary cap circumvention, a league spokesperson told ESPN.
